title: The Hidden Box
content: While planting flowers in the backyard, Jack's shovel struck something hard beneath the soil. He carefully dug around it and uncovered a small wooden box. Inside were old coins, letters, and a map of the neighborhood from many decades earlier. His grandparents recognized the handwriting immediately. The box had belonged to Jack's great-grandfather, who had buried it as a childhood time capsule. Instead of treasure, the family discovered a wonderful piece of their own history.
